name: Gourmet Caesar Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry the lettuce leaves.
2. Break the lettuce into bite-sized pieces.
3. Place the pieces in a large salad bowl.
4. Add Gourmet Caesar dressing to the bowl.
5. Sprinkle croutons, grated Parmesan cheese, and freshly ground pepper over the lettuce.
6. Toss gently until well combined.
7. Serve immediately.
